title: Alex's Mobs Extra Music
description: An addon for Alex's Mobs that adds music which will play during boss fights.
body:
## ♪ Alex's Mobs Extra Music ♪

This is an addon mod for the hit Minecraft mod, [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs) [(+ its unofficial port for 1.21.1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs(1.21.1)) that adds music that will play when a Void Worm is active.

### **You may adjust the volume of the music in the mod via the "Jukebox/Note Blocks" slider in Options > "Music & Sounds" in the menu in-game.**

### Listen to the Void Worm's battle theme on Soundcloud ▸ https://soundcloud.com/the-exiied-feiiow/dominus-nihilus

### Listen to the Void Worm's battle theme on Newgrounds ▸ https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1055200

### Listen to the Void Worm's battle theme on Youtube
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9EQcFrYzX2U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


<details>
<summary>How to solve the "music playing at spawn" problem</summary>

You probably had **Dynamic Surroundings** installed. Don't worry, it isn't a total necessity to outright prune the mod off your modlist. Instead, you may follow these steps to resolve the issue **while still keeping Dynamic Surroundings around** - fingers crossed!
[https://docs.google.com/document/d/1T0fpHUYm9zE_luBFx0mNjUFQxZxxc6drXSR_lBbBJCc/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1T0fpHUYm9zE_luBFx0mNjUFQxZxxc6drXSR_lBbBJCc/edit?usp=sharing)

</details>
